flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Lake Superior State University fell 46% between 2006 and 2009 (19.2% → 10.3%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Lake Superior State University fell 17% between 2021 and 2024 (1.6k → 1.3k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Lake Superior State University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($13.2k → $14.9k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Lake Superior State University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($13.2k → $14.9k).
